headline: This Saturday, choose goal over comfort
summary: You're losing 0.11kg weekly instead of 0.66kg needed; today you skip weekend snacking and earn 45 minutes on the rowing machine.
details: Your eating today: pre-portioned Huel meals only, zero emotional snacking—Saturday is your known weakness, so eliminate the choice entirely. Your movement: 45 minutes on the rowing machine at a steady, slightly breathless pace. Why: at your current pace you'll never reach 88kg by 2027-06-08; but one disciplined Saturday builds momentum and proves you can execute when it matters most.
